title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and artificial intelligence, taught by David J. Malan. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with supporting community channels across Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other social platforms.
writeup: This CS50 video offers a behind-the-scenes look at Chapter 1, "Playing," from the Introduction to Artificial Intelligence series featuring Brian Yu, part of Harvard University's broader CS50 program led by David J. Malan. It situates the AI material within CS50's wider computer science curriculum, which spans AI education and computer science fundamentals. The course reaches learners through multiple platforms, including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, and is backed by community channels on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other social platforms.
